Modified: head/games/gemrb/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/games/gemrb/Makefile	Sat May 11 11:37:54 2013	(r317865)
+++ head/games/gemrb/Makefile	Sat May 11 12:03:02 2013	(r317866)
@@ -1,7 +1,8 @@
+# Created by: Timothy Beyer <beyert@cs.ucr.edu>
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	gemrb
-PORTVERSION=	0.7.2
+PORTVERSION=	0.8.0
 CATEGORIES=	games emulators
